data.title: Oracle Stock Falls As Amazon AI Threat Looms: Why BofA Sees Long-Term Upside
data.description:
Oracle Corp (NYSE:ORCL) shares are trading lower on Tuesday following reports suggesting that Amazon is developing an AI agent tool to automate some sales, business development and other functions.

Reports also suggest that concerns over AI disrupting SaaS business models is one of the drivers behind recent attempts to withdraw funds from private credit funds.

Moreover, Oracle announced fresh product launches around its Fusion Applications AI tooling, even as the Technology sector stayed soft.

BofA Securities analyst Tal Liani reinstated a Buy rating with a price forecast of $200.

Oracle’s Strategic Pivot: Cloud and AI at the Forefront

The analyst writes that the rating reflects a balanced view of strong AI infrastructure demand versus the timing, concentration, and capital intensity of Oracle's transformation.

With $553 billion in remaining performance obligations (RPO) tied to long-term AI training and cloud infrastructure, Oracle has significant revenue potential, adds the analyst.

Liani says that, however, the company must prove it can deliver capacity, convert long-term contracts into revenue and manage a capital-intensive buildout.

Market Reaction and Financial Outlook Amidst High Stakes

The analyst highligjhts key factors shaping Oracle's investment case. This includes the timing of revenue recognition, customer concentration, and capital intensity.

A significant portion of the backlog is tied to a few frontier AI developers, notably OpenAI, adds the analyst.

At the same time, Oracle is scaling hyperscale-level investments while operating with negative free cash flow and rising leverage, requiring continued access to external financing, writes the analyst.

Strong Growth Estimates

Liani projects revenue growth of 17%, 33% and 46% in FY26–FY28 as OCI capacity ramps, alongside roughly 1,200 bps of gross margin compression.

The analyst expects free cash flow margins to remain negative through FY29 due to heavy capex, but these front-loaded investments are typical in disruptive innovation cycles, and the focus should be on performance beyond this investment phase.

ORCL Stock Price Activity: Oracle shares were down 4.34% at $147.57 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo via Shutterstock

data.title: Microsoft Sits At The Center Of The AI Supercycle, Analyst Says
data.description:
Data Center Expansion To Meet AI Demand

The site, adjacent to Oracle and OpenAI's Stargate campus, was secured from developer Crusoe after earlier negotiations with Oracle and OpenAI collapsed over financing issues and shifting requirements, Bloomberg reported on Monday.

The deal reflects Microsoft's accelerating push to expand AI and cloud infrastructure. The company committed about $50 billion in new data center leases last quarter, reversing a slowdown in projects seen a year earlier.

Analyst Sees Strong Growth Across AI Stack

On Tuesday, Bank of America Securities analyst Tal Liani said Microsoft remains a long-term artificial intelligence leader, reinstating coverage with a Buy rating and a $500 price forecast, implying about 31% upside.

Liani expects Microsoft to deliver sustained, multi-year growth as it monetizes AI across both its cloud infrastructure and software ecosystem. He pointed to Azure as the backbone for enterprise AI workloads, while products including Microsoft 365, Dynamics, GitHub, and Windows continue to integrate AI features that drive usage and spending.

He forecasts total revenue growth of 15% to 17% over the next three years. This will be led by a 24 to 28% growth in Intelligent Cloud as AI workloads scale.

Liani based his valuation on a 24x 2027 earnings multiple, above the roughly 19x peer average, citing Microsoft's scale and positioning in AI.

He also highlighted key risks, including the pace at which Microsoft converts its AI backlog into revenue, the evolving economics of its partnership with OpenAI, and uncertainty over the durability of the current AI cycle.

He expects margins to face near-term pressure from higher AI-related spending. Gross margins could decline by about 340 basis points through fiscal 2028, while operating margins remain above 46%, supported by the company's software mix.

Free cash flow margins may fall into the low-20% range from about 30% in fiscal 2024 as capital expenditures rise from $44 billion to about $143 billion by fiscal 2028, which he views as a temporary investment phase tied to AI growth.

MSFT Price Action: Microsoft shares were down 2.72% at $372.58 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Tiger Woods' Golf Comeback Starts Tonight Vs. 'Impressed' Reddit Founder's TGL Club
data.description:
Tiger Woods Makes Return to Golf

Billionaire Tiger Woods is best known for his play on the golf course, but he's also been helping coach the Jupiter Links Golf Club, a team in the TGL 3 vs. 3 golf league he helped create.

Woods, who hasn't competed professionally this season as he recovers from an October back surgery, is marking his return Tuesday night to help the team he co-owns and is the captain of.

Jupiter lost the first match of a best-of-three championship finals against the LA Golf Club, a team that counts Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian, tennis legends Serena Williams and Venus Williams and other athletes as co-owners.

Ohanian, who is also an investor in the TGL league, is the controlling owner of LA Golf Club.

"It's funny, I bought the first franchise in the league because Tiger had called me up and told me he was starting a golf league and that I should take a look as an investor," Ohanian told Benzinga. "I was a little skeptical, honestly, before I took the pitch, but I was so impressed with the vision and the concept that I not only invested in the league, I said, ‘I'm going to buy the first team.'"

Ohanian said he's lucky things worked out, and he's now an investor in the league and the LA Golf Club team that finds itself in the finals. Up 1-0 in the best-of-three finals, things now change slightly with Woods entering the mix.

"It's just mind-blowing to think that we're going up against the GOAT Tiger Woods in the finals."

Preview of Masters 2026 Return?

The timing of Woods’ return to golf will quickly mark speculation of whether this is to provide a boost to the team and league he has ownership stakes in and/or a test to see if he can handle professional golf after surgery setbacks over the last year.

The Masters Tournament, a staple of Woods' career, takes place April 9 through April 12 and the legendary golfer has not committed to participate or sit out at this point.

"I said I've been working on it. Sometimes I have good days, sometimes I have bad days. Disk replacement is not a lot of fun," Woods said of the Masters last week, as reported by ESPN.

Prediction market Polymarket shows a 71% chance that Woods will compete in the 2026 Masters.

For Woods, it's likely not just about competing, but also factoring into the leaderboard. In five events on the PGA Tour in 2024, Woods made the cut in only one, withdrawing or missing the cut in four tournaments. After a strong start to the 2024 Masters, Woods ended up in 60th place at +16 over par.

Ohanian said whether or not Woods plays at the Masters, Tuesday's return should not be forgotten.

"This is just one more example of how his remarkable legacy continues to grow the game, and I couldn't be more proud to be a tiny, tiny part of it," Ohanian told Benzinga.

Image created using artificial intelligence via Gemini.

data.title: FDA Review Puts Rezolute's Genetic Disorder Drug Path In Question
data.description:
In a recent update, Rezolute shared insights from its March 17 meeting with the FDA regarding its Phase 3 sunRIZE trial for ersodetug, aimed at treating congenital hyperinsulinism.

FDA Meeting Highlights Mixed Efficacy Signals In SunRIZE Trial

The company reported that while the primary endpoint was not statistically significant, there were clinically meaningful improvements in hypoglycemia events as measured by continuous glucose monitoring.

The FDA acknowledged the challenges posed by behavioral factors in clinical trials, emphasizing the need for well-controlled studies.

Rezolute is expected to submit further study reports for independent evaluation, which could lead to a marketing application for ersodetug later this year.

The agency and the company then discussed summary outcomes from various CGM-based glycemic endpoints and preliminary observations from the OLE. 

Regulatory Path Hinges On Additional Data Submission And Independent Review

As a next step for the program, the FDA encouraged Rezolute to submit study reports and analysis datasets for the agency’s independent evaluation. 

Following that review, Rezolute believes that a determination may be made whether there is sufficient evidence to support the submission of a marketing application for sunRIZE or if additional information is required. The company expects to have an update on the program in the second half of 2026.

Rezolute Technical Analysis

The stock is currently trading 13.9% below its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 48.5% below its 100-day SMA, indicating a bearish trend in the short to medium term.

Shares have decreased by 15.84% over the past 12 months and are positioned closer to their 52-week lows than highs.

The RSI is at 35.46, which is considered neutral territory, while the MACD shows a value of -0.2377, below its signal line at -0.1705, indicating bearish pressure on the stock.

The combination of neutral RSI and bearish MACD suggests mixed momentum for Rezolute, indicating that while the stock is not oversold, it is still facing downward pressure.

  • Key Resistance: $3.00
  • Key Support: $2.00

Analyst Consensus & Recent Actions: The stock carries a Buy Rating with an average price target of $10.67. Recent analyst moves include:

  • Wedbush: Neutral (Raises Target to $2.00) (Jan. 8)
  • BTIG: Buy (Maintains Target to $5.00) (Jan. 8)
  • Guggenheim: Buy (Lowers Target to $6.00) (Dec. 12, 2025)

RZLT Stock Price Activity: Rezolute shares were up 7.29% at $2.58 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: Abivax CEO Downplays Sale Talk, Eyes Capital Raise As Key Trial Data Readout Nears
data.description:
• Abivax stock is taking a hit today. Why is ABVX stock falling?

The French biotech firm has been at the center of takeover rumors for months, with analysts identifying it as a potential acquisition target for large pharmaceutical companies.

Eli Lilly and Co (NYSE:LLY) previously expressed interest.

But management's latest comments suggest the company is not under pressure to sell and is instead focused on strengthening its financial position ahead of a potential commercialization phase.

Upcoming Trial Seen As Major Catalyst

Investor attention is firmly fixed on Abivax's second late-stage trial evaluating the long-term maintenance effect of its lead drug candidate, obefazimod, for ulcerative colitis.

The independent Data Safety Monitoring board completed a safety review of the ongoing Phase 3 ABTECT-UC maintenance trial and reported no new safety signals.

Nearly 90% of enrolled participants have completed the 44-week treatment period.

The company remains on track to report topline results from its ABTECT-UC maintenance trials in the late second quarter of 2026.

The upcoming readout is widely viewed as a critical inflection point.

If results are positive, the company plans to submit for U.S. Food and Drug Administration approval in the fourth quarter.

Abivax stock skyrocketed in July 2025 after the company announced overwhelmingly positive topline results from its Phase 3 ABTECT-1 (Study 105) and ABTECT-2 (Study 106) trials for oral obefazimod (ABX464) for severely active ulcerative colitis.

Capital Raise Likely Post-Data Readout

CEO De Garidel indicated that Abivax is likely to pursue a mix of equity and debt financing after the trial readout, with funding needs expected to reach several million dollars.

The company is currently evaluating the size and timing of the raise, aiming to secure enough capital to advance operations toward profitability.

On Monday, Abivax reported cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments of 530.4 million (around $614.42 million) as of Dec. 31, 2025.

It provides cash runway into the fourth quarter of 2027.

In July 2025, after the data readout, the company raised around $650 million via a capital raise.

Partnership Strategy Outside The U.S.

CNBC noted that, given its relatively small size of round 150 employees, Abivax does not plan to independently execute a global launch.

Instead, it intends to seek commercial partners for markets outside the U.S. following the maintenance data release.

Management noted that multiple partnerships could be considered depending on interest and strategic fit, reinforcing a flexible approach to global expansion.

ABVX Stock Price Activity: Abivax shares were down 4.83% at $109.84 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock
